finalHonestStatus: STRICT FINITE AUDIT COMPLETE / NO PROOF CLAIMS / OPEN CONJECTURE BOUNDARIES REMAIN

proofBoundaries.BSD Toy Curve: BSD concerns rank, L-functions, and rational points; bounded integer scanning is only a toy window.
proofBoundaries.Goldbach: Still need a universal proof for every even integer beyond the finite range.
proofBoundaries.P vs NP Toy: P vs NP requires asymptotic complexity proof over all NP problems, not one bounded subset-sum instance.
proofBoundaries.Riemann Surface Fence: This checks a soft prime-counting fence only; it does not address zeta zeros on the critical line.
proofBoundaries.Twin Prime: Still need proof that infinitely many twin-prime pairs exist.

BSD Toy Curve.checked: integer x in [-1000, 1000] for y^2 = x^3 + -1x + 1
BSD Toy Curve.failureCondition: OPEN_WINDOW if no integer points are found in the bounded window; not a proof of no rational points.
BSD Toy Curve.proofBoundary: BSD concerns rank, L-functions, and rational points; bounded integer scanning is only a toy window.
BSD Toy Curve.reviewerNote: No overclaim: bounded integer points do not determine BSD.

Goldbach.checked: verified every even E from 4 to 10000 (4999 values)
Goldbach.failureCondition: Fail immediately if any even E has zero independently verified prime-pair witnesses.
Goldbach.proofBoundary: Still need a universal proof for every even integer beyond the finite range.
Goldbach.reviewerNote: Finite evidence only. No overclaim: this does not prove Goldbach.

P vs NP Toy.checked: subset-sum toy search with 21 items; brute masks checked=1024
P vs NP Toy.failureCondition: Toy failure if no subset found or verification does not match target.
P vs NP Toy.proofBoundary: P vs NP requires asymptotic complexity proof over all NP problems, not one bounded subset-sum instance.
P vs NP Toy.reviewerNote: Only demonstrates search versus verification timing on one generated instance.

Riemann Surface Fence.failureCondition: Surface warning if error/fence ratio exceeds chosen soft fence; this is not an RH disproof.
Riemann Surface Fence.proofBoundary: This checks a soft prime-counting fence only; it does not address zeta zeros on the critical line.
Riemann Surface Fence.reviewerNote: Reviewer should reject any claim stronger than surface numerics.

Twin Prime.checked: recounted all twin pairs p,p+2 with p+2 <= 10000
Twin Prime.failureCondition: Fail finite audit if any counted pair is not independently prime; no-pair window is finite failure only.
Twin Prime.proofBoundary: Still need proof that infinitely many twin-prime pairs exist.
Twin Prime.reviewerNote: Finite pair count cannot prove infinitude.

title: STRICT ANY-N AUDIT REPORT
warning: Finite evidence only. Not proof. No open conjecture is proven here.
